overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi action game featuring a heavily armored space marine navigating ancient alien ruins under a purple nebula sky. The character runs and jumps across floating stone platforms, traverses elevated vistas with floating debris and energy storms, and moves through statue-lined corridors while engaging distant targets.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a space marine running across elevated ancient stone ruins under a purple nebula sky. The character jumps across gaps in the platform while aiming at distant enemy figures visible on a far platform, approaching the edge of the vista.

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the cliffside ruins with a full view of the cosmic vista. Floating rock formations drift in the purple nebula sky while green lightning strikes in the background. The camera pans to show the scale of the alien environment as the character surveys the floating debris above.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered corridor lined with massive ancient statues and stone pillars. The lighting shifts to low light as the sky becomes occluded by the structure. Purple-glowing enemy figures are visible in the distance ahead as the character moves through the skull-decorated architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, cosmic vista of ancient ruins into the oppressive shadows of a statue-lined corridor. It begins with a space marine sprinting across elevated stone platforms under a purple nebula sky, jumping across gaps while aiming at distant enemies. As the character reaches the cliffside, the view expands to reveal floating rock formations and green lightning striking across the alien horizon. The scene then shifts as the marine moves from the open air into a covered structure, where the bright cosmic light is occluded by massive stone pillars. Finally, the environment transitions into a low-light corridor decorated with skulls and ancient statues, leading the character toward purple-glowing figures waiting in the distance.
